title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Prada Group Limited
body: "Application number 5363  Applicant Prada S.A. objected to the name used by Prada Group Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 3 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Prada Group Limited is changed to 15867926, Ltd. "
